channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [MOSCHIP] Moschip Tech: EGM Corrigendum for FY 2026-27
item.description:
Moschip Technologies Ltd issued a corrigendum to the notice for its 1st Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) for the financial year 2026-2027, scheduled for May 12, 2026. The corrigendum addresses amendments to the Explanatory Statement based on suggestions from Stock Exchange(s). Key changes pertain to the proposal/intention of promoters and the list of proposed allottees for the preferential issue of equity shares to Vayavya Labs Private Limited shareholders. The original EGM notice was circulated on April 20, 2026, and the corrigendum was sent electronically on May 7, 2026.

  • Moschip Tech issues corrigendum for May 12, 2026 EGM.
  • Amendments made to Explanatory Statement based on stock exchange feedback.
  • Changes affect promoter intentions and allottee list for preferential issue.
  • Corrigendum sent electronically on May 7, 2026.
  • Original EGM notice was circulated on April 20, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Moschip Technologies Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [TLL] Trident Lifeline Audited Results for Year Ended March 2026
item.description:
Trident Lifeline Ltd has announced its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the half year and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved the results in a meeting held on May 7, 2026. The company will publish an extract of the financial results in newspapers and on its website. Additionally, DAC & Co. Chartered Accountants were appointed as the Internal Auditor for the Financial Year 2026-2027.

  • Audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for FY26 approved.
  • DAC & Co. appointed as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-2027.
  • Financial results will be published in newspapers and on the company website.
  • Board meeting was held on May 7, 2026, to approve the results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Trident Lifeline Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PRABHHANS] Prabhhans Industries Board Meeting on 12/05/2026
item.description:
Prabhhans Industries Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 12, 2026, to consider and approve the standalone audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will also address other items as decided by the Board. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities is closed from April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 12, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Standalone audited financial results for FY26 will be considered.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, reopening 48 hours post results.
  • Meeting to be held at the company's registered office in Hyderabad.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Prabhhans Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MNKALCOLTD] Manaksia Aluminium: FY26 Audited Results & ₹0.05 Dividend
item.description:
Manaksia Aluminium Company Ltd approved audited standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board recommended a final dividend of ₹0.05 per equity share (5%) for FY26, subject to shareholder approval. They also approved the appointment of M/s. S Bhalotia & Associates as Internal Auditor and M/s. S. Chhaparia & Associates as Cost Auditor for FY 2026-27.

  • Audited standalone financial results for FY26 approved.
  • Final dividend of ₹0.05 per share recommended for FY26.
  • M/s. S Bhalotia & Associates appointed as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • M/s. S. Chhaparia & Associates appointed as Cost Auditor for FY 2026-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Manaksia Aluminium Company Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [CHITRTX] MKP Mobility: Insider Trading Disclosure by Aanjan & Jitesh Patodia
item.description:
MKP Mobility Ltd received disclosures from Aanjan Jitesh Patodia and Jitesh Mahendrakumar Patodia regarding insider trading under Regulation 7(2) of the SEBI PIT Regulations, 2015. The disclosures pertain to off-market inter-se transfer of shares between the promoters and immediate relatives by way of gift. The transactions took place on May 6, 2026, in Pune.

  • Aanjan Jitesh Patodia acquired shares through off-market inter-se transfer as a gift.
  • Jitesh Mahendrakumar Patodia disposed of shares through off-market inter-se transfer as a gift.
  • Both transactions involve transfers between promoters and immediate relatives.
  • The disclosures are made under Regulation 7(2) of SEBI PIT Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CHITRADURGA SPINTEX LTD. | Category: Insider Trading

item.title: [TLL] Trident Lifeline Appoints DAC & Co. as Internal Auditor
item.description:
Trident Lifeline Ltd's Board of Directors has approved the appointment of DAC & Co. Chartered Accountants (FRN: 137035W, PR: 014160) as the Internal Auditor for the company for the financial year 2026-2027. This decision was made during the board meeting held on May 7, 2026, where the audited financial results for the half year and year ended March 31, 2026, were also approved.

  • DAC & Co. appointed as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-2027.
  • Appointment approved by the Board of Directors on May 7, 2026.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved during the same meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Trident Lifeline Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [GRAVITA] Gravita India: Copper Recycling Plant at Mandvi, Capex ₹160 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Gravita India Ltd's board approved the audited financial results for FY26, closure of Recycling Infotech LLP, setting up a Copper Recycling Plant at Mandvi, Gujarat with an approximate capex of ₹160 Crores, and the appointment of Deloitte as the new Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27, replacing PwC. The Copper Recycling Plant aims for strategic diversification, optimal land utilization, and long-term shareholder value creation.

  • Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for FY26 approved.
  • Recycling Infotech LLP subsidiary to be closed.
  • Copper Recycling Plant at Mandvi, Gujarat approved with ₹160 Cr capex.
  • Deloitte appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27, replacing PwC.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GRAVITA INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PRUDENT] Prudent Corporate Appoints Chirag Shah as Non-Exec Director
item.description:
Prudent Corporate Advisory Services Ltd has appointed Mr. Chirag Ashwinkumar Shah as a Non-Executive, Non-Independent Director, effective July 22, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. The appointment was made based on the recommendation of the Nomination & Remuneration Committee. This decision was taken during the board meeting held on May 7, 2026, where the board also approved the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, recommended a final dividend of ₹3.50 per share, and re-appointed M/s. PramodKumar Dad & Associates as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.

  • Chirag Ashwinkumar Shah appointed as Non-Executive, Non-Independent Director.
  • Appointment effective July 22, 2026, pending shareholder approval.
  • Board recommends final dividend of ₹3.50 per share for FY26.
  • M/s. PramodKumar Dad & Associates re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27.
  • Audited financial results for year ended March 31, 2026 approved with unmodified opinion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Prudent Corporate Advisory Services Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VESUVIUS] Vesuvius India: No Interim Dividend Declared on May 7, 2026
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Vesuvius India Ltd, in its meeting held on May 7, 2026, did not declare any interim dividend on the equity shares of the company. The board approved the Standalone Unaudited Financial Results for the First Quarter ended on March 31, 2026. The meeting commenced at 3:55 P.M. and concluded at 4:30 P.M. (IST).

  • Vesuvius India's board did not declare an interim dividend on May 7, 2026.
  • Standalone Unaudited Financial Results for Q1 ended March 31, 2026 were approved.
  • Statutory Auditors issued a Limited Review Report with an unmodified opinion.
  • Board meeting commenced at 3:55 P.M. and concluded at 4:30 P.M. (IST).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VESUVIUS INDIA LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [TOTEM] Forbes Precision Tools: Audited Results for FY26
item.description:
Forbes Precision Tools and Machine Parts Ltd announced audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved the results in a meeting held on May 7, 2026. Auditors, Sharp & Tannan Associates, issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results. Kishore Bhatia & Associates were re-appointed as Cost Auditors for FY 2026-27.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the Board on May 7, 2026.
  • Sharp & Tannan Associates issued an unmodified audit opinion.
  • Kishore Bhatia & Associates re-appointed as Cost Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Board meeting commenced at 3.30 p.m. and concluded at 5.35 p.m.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Forbes Precision Tools and Machine Parts Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
